description: Block-form <match for=Phase on=@phase> arm swap (§18.0.1). A click sets @phase = Phase.Loading; the matching arm body swaps into the mount slot (idle arm gone, loading arm present). Whole-tree mode captures the impl#1 match-mount <div>; anchored asserts on the author's data-arm.
rationale: §18.0.1 match block-form: the dispatcher subscribes to @phase and swaps the matching arm on change. Driven by a user click (NOT a banned direct state-set).
